task: Browse iPhone X for sale that is in good condition, has a max price of 400, and searches in titles only.
final_result_response:
Successfully navigated to https://craigslist.org/ and applied all the requested search filters for iPhone X listings:

✅ **Search Query:** "iPhone X"
✅ **Max Price:** $400
✅ **Condition:** Good
✅ **Search Titles Only:** Enabled (checked)

The search was performed in the Electronics category. The results page showed limited listings in the Columbus, OH area — one nearby result was found: an *iPhone 11 Pro/XS/X Glass Screen Protector* listed for free in Wayne County (3/22). No exact local matches for an iPhone X in "good" condition under $400 were available at this time in this region.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wanted to search Craigslist for iPhone X listings with: (1) condition = "good", (2) max price = $400, and (3) "search titles only" enabled. Success means applying all three filters along with the "iPhone X" search query and retrieving results.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to craigslist.org, went to the Electronics category, typed "iPhone X" as the search term, set the max price to $400 (URL confirmed max_price=400), clicked the "search titles only" checkbox (URL confirmed srchType=T), expanded the condition filter, and checked "good". All four required filters were applied. The final state analysis confirmed all filters active. Results were reported (limited listings in Columbus, OH area).

**Evidence:** Step 5 confirmed max price "400" typed into element 3119, with the URL updating to include max_price=400. Step 6 confirmed clicking the "search titles only" checkbox (element 3069), with the URL changing to include srchType=T. Step 10 confirmed clicking the "good" condition checkbox (element 12735). Step 11 (browser_analyze_state) verified all filters were active: search query "iPhone X", max price $400, titles only checked, and "good" condition checked. All required interactions are evidenced in the trace.

**Summary:** All four required search parameters (iPhone X query, $400 max price, "good" condition, titles-only search) were successfully applied on Craigslist, as confirmed by URL parameters and a final state analysis step. The agent completed the browsing task with all specified filters.
